commit_message: Add required finding budget guard to DCOIR Review
default_branch_reason: Operator explicitly requested applying the DCOIR Review hybrid fixes directly to live main. The apply-patch lane is used with the current target blob guard because full-file replacement through the connector is too risky for this script. Retried after broadening the ops apply-patch workflow trigger and documenting the request staging contract. The patch checksum was corrected to the exact bytes checked out from GitHub after repository line-ending normalization.
